zh.lifeSummary: 當John Clark於大約1609年出生在英國英格蘭戴文時，他的父親Ellis Clark27歲，母親Margery Gomer23歲。他於大約1634年與Tamsin在英國戴文布藍斯可姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1657年2月16日在他的家鄉享年49歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Clark于大约1609年出生在英国英格兰戴文时，他的父亲Ellis Clark27岁，母亲Margery Gomer23岁。他于大约1634年与Tamsin在英国戴文布藍斯可姆结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1657年2月16日在他的家乡享年49岁，埋葬在英国英格兰戴文。

nameMeanings.name: Clark
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English clerk, clark ‘clerk, cleric, writer’ (Old French clerc; see Clerc ). The original sense was ‘man in a religious order, cleric, clergyman’. As all writing and secretarial work in medieval Christian Europe was normally done by members of the clergy, the term clerk came to mean ‘scholar, secretary, recorder, or penman’ as well as ‘cleric’. As a surname, it was particularly common for one who had taken only minor holy orders. In medieval Christian Europe, clergy in minor orders were permitted to marry and so found families; thus the surname could become established.
Irish (Westmeath, Mayo): in Ireland the English surname was frequently adopted, partly by translation for Ó Cléirigh; see Cleary .
Americanized form of Dutch   De Klerk   or Flemish   De Clerck   or of variants of these names, and possibly also of French   Clerc  . Compare   Clerk   2 and   De Clark  .

variants.name: Clarke
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Clark  .

History: This name was brought independently to New England by many bearers from the 17th century onward. Nicholas Clarke was one of the founders of Hartford, CT (coming from Cambridge, MA with Thomas Hooker) in 1635.

variants.name: Clerk
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Pierre, Jacques.
Americanized form of French   Clerc   and perhaps also of the Dutch and Flemish cognates   De Klerk   and   De Clerck   or of variants of these names. Compare   Clark   3.

variants.name: Clerkin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Liam, Brendan, Dympna, Seamus.

Irish (Monaghan): from an Irish pet form of English clerk ‘cleric’ (Irish cléireach), see Clark . Alternatively, an Anglicized form of Ó Cléireacháin, ‘descendant of little cleric’, an Irish diminutive of the word. See also McClurkin , an Antrim surname from Mac Cléirchín ‘son of little cleric’.

variants.name: Calarco
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rocco, Angelo, Carmelo, Fausto, Nunziato, Salvatore.
Italian (southern): probably a nickname derived from Greek kalē archē ‘good beginning’. Compare Clark 4.

variants.name: Clerc
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alain, Odette, Sebastien, Serge.

French: occupational or status name for a member of a minor religious order or for a scholar, Old French clerc, from Late Latin clericus, from Greek klērikos, a derivative of klēros ‘inheritance, legacy’, with reference to the priestly tribe of Levites (see Levy ) ‘whose inheritance was the Lord’. In medieval Christian Europe, clergy in minor orders were permitted to marry and so found families; thus the surname could become established. In the Middle Ages it was virtually only members of religious orders who learned to read and write, so that the term clerc later came to denote any literate man, a scholar (hence its modern meaning ‘scribe, secretary’ or ‘clerk’). Compare Leclerc .

variants.name: Clarkson
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): patronymic from   Clark  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Clark was born about 1609, in Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, Ellis Clark, was 27 and his mother, Margery Gomer, was 23. He married Tamsin about 1634, in Branscombe, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 16 February 1657, in his hometown, at the age of 49, and was buried in Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Clark est né environ 1609, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ellis Clark, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Margery Gomer, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Tamsin environ 1634, à Branscombe, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 16 février 1657, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Clark um 1609 in Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ellis Clark 27 und seine Mutter Margery Gomer 23. Er hat um 1634 in Branscombe, Devon, England Tamsin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 16. Februar 1657 im Alter von 49 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Devon, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Clark è nato il circa 1609 nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Ellis Clark, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Margery Gomer, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Tamsin circa 1634, nel Branscombe, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 16 febbraio 1657, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Clarkが約1609年にイギリスイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Ellis Clarkは27歳，母Margery Gomerは23歳であった。約1634年にイギリスデボンブランスコンベでTamsinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1657年2月16日に故郷で49歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Clark(이)가 대략 1609년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ellis Clark(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Gomer(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1634년 영국 데폰 브랜스코브에서 Tamsin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1657년 2월 16일 그의 고향에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Clark nasceu aproximadamente 1609, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ellis Clark, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Margery Gomer, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Tamsin aproximadamente 1634, em Branscombe, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 16 de fevereiro de 1657, em sua cidade natal, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Clark родился около 1609 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ellis Clark было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Gomer, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Tamsin около 1634 г. в местности бранскомб, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 16 февраля 1657 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Clark nació aproximadamente 1609, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Ellis Clark, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Margery Gomer, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Tamsin aproximadamente 1634, en Branscombe, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 16 de febrero de 1657, en su pueblo, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
